§6Reformate§f is a processed petroleum product from the §bVacuum Refinery§f.

§eObtaining:§f
• Process petroleum through Vacuum Refinery
• Part of advanced petrochemical chain

§eUses:§f
• Creates §bReformate Gas§f for chemical synthesis
• Path to §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f

§aTip:§f Essential intermediate for accessing the best acidizer solvent tier.
